title: The Australians Choosing To Leave Money To Charity Instead Of Their Children | 10 News+
description: New data has revealed that one in three Australians are choosing to leave their estate to charity instead of their children after they pass away. title: 19-Year-Old Wrestling Champion Executed By Public Hanging In Iran | 10 News+
description: Iranian state TV have named Saleh Mohammadi among three young men executed by public hanging for the uniquely Iranian crime of waging war against God. He was a sports hero and, at just 19 years old, a national wrestling champion. However, that did not save Saleh Mohammadi after he took part in a demonstration against the Iranian regime in January.
